## Summary

Describe the change and user impact.

## Privacy and security

- [ ] No real PII, credentials, or production prompts were added.
- [ ] No new network request, telemetry, remote code, or broad host permission was introduced.
- [ ] The threat model or privacy policy was updated when data handling changed.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
